useConditions: The latest clean BaseScan token profile request was already submitted from support@gcagochina.com.
The official inbox, spam folder, and BaseScan account notifications have no reviewer reply.
The current public daily status snapshot is live and readyForBaseScanResubmission is true.
The follow-up is sent as one reply inside the existing ticket whenever possible.

followupTemplate.subject: Follow-up: GCA Token Profile Update - Base Mainnet Contract 0x3197c42f4a06f7be32a9a742ac2a766f0ff682c6
followupTemplate.body:
Hello BaseScan team,

I am following up on the GCA token profile update request for Base Mainnet.

Network: Base Mainnet / chainId 8453
Contract: 0x3197c42f4a06f7be32a9a742ac2a766f0ff682c6
Official website: https://gcagochina.com/
Official project email: support@gcagochina.com
BaseScan Handoff: https://gcagochina.com/basescan-handoff.html
Project profile reviewer map: https://gcagochina.com/project-profile.html#basescanMapTitle
Tim Chen professional profile: https://gcagochina.com/tim-chen.html
Domain email evidence: https://gcagochina.com/domain-email-evidence.html
Daily public status: https://gcagochina.com/daily-status.html
English follow-up page: https://gcagochina.com/basescan-followup.html
Chinese follow-up page: https://gcagochina.com/zh-basescan-followup.html

The current public materials address the prior information-insufficient return reasons: official HTTPS website, project-domain email, founder/team profile, whitepaper, brand kit, support page, domain email evidence, GitHub repository, Telegram, X, official GCA/USDT market route, and clear public claim boundaries.

The latest daily public status snapshot was refreshed at 2026-07-23T16:08:40Z and reports readyForBaseScanResubmission as true. Could you please confirm whether the request is still in the review queue, or whether any additional field correction or owner-wallet signature is required?

We will avoid duplicate token-profile submissions while this request is under review.

Thank you.

doNotClaim: BaseScan token-profile approval before the BaseScan contract page publicly displays the submitted profile
third-party audit completion before an independent report is published
reserve, LP, vesting, or multisig custody before on-chain custody changes
deep liquidity, price support, ranking acceptance, or market-quality approval
